message:
fix(tools,guard,share,storage): robustness and performance improvements across crates

Guard: handle numeric expires_ts in archive reservations, consolidate
redundant test cases. Tools: use Arc<CompiledPattern> via cached() in
reservation index, messaging, and overlap checks to avoid recompilation.
Fix contact target parsing to always extract agent name from project:slug
syntax even when --to-project is also given. Improve fenced/brace JSON
extraction to handle multiple blocks and trailing garbage. Fix products
UID generation to use cast_unsigned for hex formatting. Reservations:
simplify suspicious pattern detection and renewal filter matching.

Share: move attachment path resolution inside the processing closure so
permission/not-found errors are properly caught. Handle PermissionDenied
and InvalidInput alongside NotFound for graceful degradation. Fix bundle
determinism debug output. Use resolve_detection_root in wizard prompt.
Add ORDER BY to project scope queries for deterministic results.

Storage: replace canonicalize() with manual path normalization in
rel_path_cached and resolve_archive_relative_path to eliminate expensive
readlink syscalls. Remove unnecessary exists() checks before read_dir.
Clean up temp files on failed atomic renames in build_slots.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
